text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Well, the answer to your fix can be found as a subtle hint in 
the net/ns/Makefile: 

MAINTAINER=     obonilla@fisicc-ufm.edu 

Since previous PRs from your good self have resulted in bounces 
from AT&T's mail system, I'm closing the PR.
